assertion_results.text: Documentation includes an Authentication section explaining JWT Bearer token format
assertion_results.evidence: Comprehensive Authentication section with JWT Bearer format, header example, token payload fields, and error scenarios

assertion_results.text: Each endpoint clearly indicates whether authentication is required or optional
assertion_results.evidence: Every endpoint has bold auth indicator: 'Public', 'Requires authentication', or 'Requires moderator role'

assertion_results.text: Rate limiting is documented with specific limits (100/min authenticated, 20/min anonymous)
assertion_results.evidence: Rate Limiting section with table: Authenticated 100 req/min, Anonymous 20 req/min, plus 429 response documentation

assertion_results.text: Paginated endpoints document pagination parameters (page, per_page or cursor) with defaults
assertion_results.evidence: GET /api/posts: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 20). GET comments: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 50)

assertion_results.text: Response schema for list endpoints shows the pagination envelope (items, total, has_more)
assertion_results.evidence: Response example shows items array, total, page, per_page, has_more fields

assertion_results.text: Public read endpoints (GET) are distinguished from authenticated write endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE)
assertion_results.evidence: GET endpoints marked 'Public - no auth required', write endpoints marked 'Requires authentication'

assertion_results.text: At least one curl example includes the Authorization header with a Bearer token
assertion_results.evidence: Multiple curl examples include -H 'Authorization: Bearer eyJhbG...'

assertion_results.text: The OpenAPI spec includes a securitySchemes component defining the JWT bearer scheme
assertion_results.evidence: securitySchemes.bearerAuth with type: http, scheme: bearer, bearerFormat: JWT. Global security now correctly configured.
